
▸ Operations (32)

• get-customers	GET	/customers
• get-customers-by-id	GET	/customers/{id}
• get-events-by-id	GET	/events/{id}

• get-invoices-by-id-file	GET	/invoices/{id}/file
• get-leads	GET	/leads
• get-leads-by-id	GET	/leads/{id}
• get-meter-orders	GET	/meter-orders
• get-meter-orders-by-id	GET	/meter-orders/{id}
• get-oauth-authorize	GET	/oauth/authorize
• get-plans	GET	/plans
• get-plans-by-id	GET	/plans/{id}
• get-plans-by-id-quote	GET	/plans/{id}/quote
• get-subscriptions	GET	/subscriptions
• get-subscriptions-by-id	GET	/subscriptions/{id}
• get-subscriptions-by-id-consumption	GET	/subscriptions/{id}/consumption
• get-subscriptions-by-id-invoices	GET	/subscriptions/{id}/invoices

• get-subscriptions-by-id-prices	GET	/subscriptions/{id}/prices
• get-suppliers	GET	/suppliers
• get-suppliers-search	GET	/suppliers/search
• get-well-known-oauth-authorization-server	GET	/.well-known/oauth-authorization-server
• post-admin-magic-link	POST	/admin/magic_link
